page: Microsoft Azure E48as_v4 is an EASv4-family virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 48 vCPUs, 24 physical cores, and a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this server includes 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The server is equipped with 786 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark results demonstrate strong multi-core and memory capabilities. The server achieves top 25% performance in stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests, as well as in PassMark CPU encryption and Geekbench multi-core tests. Its memory subsystem is highly rated, scoring in the top 10% on the PassMark memory score, although memory bandwidth for large blocks remains in the average tier. For specialized tasks, it shows strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and image processing, while large-model LLM text generation is a relative bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25%.

Given its high memory density and dedicated AMD EPYC processor, the E48as_v4 offers solid qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive enterprise workloads without the overhead of GPU hardware. The combination of 384 GB of RAM, 786 GB of local storage, and strong multi-core processing makes this server well-suited for relational databases, in-memory caching systems, data analytics, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E48as_v4 is an EASv4-family virtual machine powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores running at 3.525 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this memory-optimized server features 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB per core, alongside 786 GB of local storage. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core CPU performance and a top-tier PassMark memory score, though large-model LLM text generation remains a relative performance bottleneck. With its high memory density and Premium Storage capability, the E48as_v4 provides a balanced, cost-efficient profile for memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suited for database operations, in-memory caching, and data-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E48as_v4 is an EASv4 virtual machine featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and 786 GB of local storage, delivering strong multi-core and memory performance for database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E48as_v4 is a memory-optimized VM with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 786 GB local storage, ideal for database and caching workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for demanding database and caching workloads.

384 GB of system memory delivering 8.0 GB of RAM per core
786 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier memory performance scoring in the top 10% of PassMark benchmarks

Optimized for database operations, caching, and memory-heavy workloads
